description: List of donations, qa’imat al-nedava (Hebrew), recording around forty-five names and the sums of their contributions. The reverse side contains an account of collections made, one by a layman, one by the haver Ibrahim. Both men and women are listed as contributors. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:498) EMS
description_he: רשימת תרומות עם כ-45 שמות וסכומים, כולל נשים, עם חשבונות גבייה על הגב
